title: Creativity Takes Courage
short_teaser: Henri Matisse on the bravery of making art.
story: "Creativity takes courage." — Henri Matisse, one of the most influential artists of the 20th century. Matisse spent decades pushing past comfort, reinventing his style even when the world resisted change.
impact: Sharing creative work means risking judgment. Matisse reminds us that the act of creating is itself an act of bravery.
spark_application: What small experiment could you share before it feels 'ready'?
